allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); recs=d['records']; print\('divisions:', len\(recs\)\); r0=recs[0]; print\('div keys:', list\(r0.keys\(\)\)\); tr=r0['teamRecords'][0]; print\('team record keys:', list\(tr.keys\(\)\)[:25]\); import json as j; print\(j.dumps\({k:tr[k] for k in ['team','divisionRank','wins','losses','gamesBack','streak','runsScored','runsAllowed'] if k in tr}, indent=2\)\)")
